product_overview: Khushi Hygieia is a healthcare platform that connects patients, doctors, and hospitals across India for consultations, appointments, and emergency services. It includes secure authentication, provider discovery, an emergency SOS flow, and an AI-powered healthcare assistant.
core_goals: Provide secure sign-up and login for patients and doctors with profile management
Enable fast discovery of doctors and hospitals by specialization and location
Offer a streamlined appointment booking experience with real-time availability
Deliver an emergency SOS workflow that locates nearby hospitals and sends alerts
Integrate an AI healthcare assistant to answer medical queries and guide users
Maintain a responsive, performant, and professional UI across devices

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login and signup flows for patients and doctors, with session management and profile onboarding.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password -> Click Login/Signup -> Redirected to /dashboard -> See user dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password with incorrect credentials -> Click Login/Signup -> See error message "Invalid credentials"
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email and password -> Click Login/Signup -> Redirected to /profile -> See profile setup prompt
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email and password with already registered email -> Click Login/Signup -> See error message "Email already registered"

features.name: Doctor Search
features.description: Allow patients to find doctors by name, category, or specialization and view matching results.
user_flows: Navigate to /doctors -> Fill search field with specialization -> Click Search -> See list of matching doctors
Navigate to /doctors -> Fill search field with doctor name -> Click Search -> Click doctor card -> See doctor profile and availability
Navigate to /doctors -> Fill search field with unknown term -> Click Search -> See message "No results found"

features.name: Hospital Directory
features.description: Browse and discover nearby hospitals with service details and directions.
user_flows: Navigate to /hospitals -> Enter location or allow geolocation -> Click Search -> See list of nearby hospitals
Navigate to /hospitals -> Click a hospital card -> See hospital details, services, and contact info
Navigate to /hospitals -> Enter invalid location -> Click Search -> See message "No hospitals found"

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: Book appointments with doctors, view available slots, and receive booking confirmations and notifications.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Select doctor from list -> Choose available timeslot -> Click Confirm Booking -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select doctor -> Choose timeslot -> Click Confirm Booking -> See booking details on /dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard -> Select doctor -> Choose a timeslot that became unavailable -> Click Confirm Booking -> See error message "Timeslot unavailable"

features.name: Emergency SOS
features.description: Immediate SOS trigger to alert emergency contacts and locate nearest hospitals during a crisis.
user_flows: Navigate to /emergency -> Click SOS button -> Allow location access -> See emergency alert sent confirmation -> See suggested nearest hospitals
Navigate to /emergency -> Click SOS button -> Allow location access -> See option to call emergency services and send alert to contacts
Navigate to /emergency -> Click SOS button -> Deny location access -> See error message "Location required" -> See option to manually enter location

features.name: AI Assistant
features.description: An AI-powered healthcare chatbot (Gemini) to answer medical questions and help users navigate the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Type medical query -> Press Send -> See AI response in chat
Navigate to /chat -> Type question about symptoms -> Press Send -> See follow-up clarifying question from AI -> Provide additional info -> See refined AI advice
Navigate to /chat -> Type medical query -> Press Send -> See error message "Unable to fetch AI response" -> Click Retry

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Manage user personal information, preferences, and account settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Edit personal information -> Click Save -> See success message "Profile updated"
Navigate to /profile -> Update contact fields with invalid values -> Click Save -> See validation error messages next to invalid fields
Navigate to /profile -> Upload profile picture -> Click Save -> See updated avatar on profile and /dashboard

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login and signup for patients and doctors.

features.name: Emergency SOS
features.description: Trigger emergency alerts and find nearest hospitals.

features.name: AI Assistant
features.description: AI powered healthcare advisor using Gemini.
